competitors.name: Levels.fyi
competitors.notes: Premium offer-negotiation coaching is US$199-499 one-off; data is heavy on US/EU, thin on Taiwan domestic companies.

competitors.name: Glassdoor
competitors.notes: Free but ad-supported and self-reported; TW sample sizes per company are typically <10 and several years stale.

competitors.name: 104 Salary Bank (104 薪資情報)
competitors.notes: Free, broad, but aggregates at role level and reports median only; no skill, company, or yoe breakdowns.
